Q: Who should file the tax exempt property data and by when?
A: Inevenyears, the property owner (or representative) must file theTax Exemption Report (Form PC‑220)for single parcels orForm PC‑220Afor multiple parcels, with the Municipal Clerk no later than March 31. (sec. 70.337, Wis. Stats.)

Q: What does the municipal clerk do with the data?
A: The clerk compiles the data and enters it on theTaxation District Exemption Summary Report (Form PC-226).

Q: Which property types require a report?
A: Must file a report for:(sec.70.11, Wis. Stats.)

Q: What if a property owner doesn't file a Tax Exempt Report (Form PC-220) with their municipal clerk or the assessor doesn't know the property's value?
